use_cases: Display animated loading state while data is being fetched from an API
Show processing status during async operations in web applications
Provide visual feedback during page transitions or heavy computations
ai_summary: An animated loading indicator that reveals the word 'Loading' letter-by-letter with a glowing text effect while a colorful RGB gradient background oscillates horizontally. The component uses CSS keyframe animations to create a vibrant, eye-catching waiting state with dark mode support. Ideal for SaaS applications, fintech dashboards, or any interface requiring stylish loading feedback.
